top_signals.title: OpenAI takes the lead in AI IPO horse race: 'Getting to public markets first is very important'
top_signals.summary: It comes after reports that the AI giant and ChatGPT owner is set to file confidentially for an IPO as soon as this week.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
